subcodes.title: Du’a’a’l-Vahhabiyya
subcodes.first_line: O God! I testify, through Thy testimony unto Thyself, that verily Thou art God, and there is none other God but Thee. Thou art alone, peerless, unchanging, and eternal, in Thine everlasting state, unto those who recognize Thee as Thou art. Indeed, Thou art the One and the Incomparable [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اللهم انی اشهدک بشهادتک لنفسک انک انت الله لا اله الا انت وحدک لا شریک لک لم تزل کنت علی حالة الازل لمن یعرفک کما انت انت احد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @justice and wrath of God, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @impossibility of true worship of God
